nasb.text: And God blessed Noah and his sons and said to them, “Be fruitful and multiply, and fill the earth.

esv.text: And God blessed Noah and his sons and said to them, “Be fruitful and multiply and fill the earth.

cnv.text: 神賜福給挪亞和他的兒子，對他們說：“你們要繁衍增多，充滿大地。

ccb.text: 上帝赐福给挪亚和他的儿子们，对他们说：“你们要生养众多，遍布地面。

csbs.text: 神祝福挪亚和他的儿子们，对他们说：“你们要繁衍增多，充满大地。
